name: Digest long emails with Airtable and Twilio at scale

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are a precise extraction engine. Only extract values present in the text.

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf01826-request`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Collect Raw Text

### Collect Raw Text

Shapes the item: writes `content`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Extract Structured Fields

### Extract Structured Fields

Pulls structured fields (requestId, query, context) out of free text using a strict extraction prompt.

Next: All Required Fields Found?

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Extract Structured Fields** as `languageModel`

🔑 Anthropic API key

### All Required Fields Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.output?.requestId }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Upsert into Airtable · ②→ Queue for Manual Review

### Upsert into Airtable

airtable — `upsert` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Review Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Airtable PAT

### Queue for Manual Review

twilio — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Review Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Twilio SID + token

### Merge Review Paths

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Digest long emails with Airtable and Twilio at scale

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Digest long emails with Airtable and Twilio at scale. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual multi-tool agent is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Collect Raw Text → Extract Structured Fields → All Required Fields Found? → Upsert into Airtable → Merge Review Paths

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating multi-tool agent in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Airtable PAT; Anthropic API key; Twilio SID + token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your multi-tool agent process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
